query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on Magnificent 7 large acquisitions ($10B+) in 2026:

## Bottom Line
Only **two Mag 7 acquisitions at or above $10 billion** occurred/were pending in 2026:

1. **Google/Alphabet–Wiz ($32B)** — Google's largest-ever deal; announced March 2025, **CLOSED March 11, 2026**.
2. **Amazon–Globalstar (~$11.6B)** — announced April 14, 2026, **STILL PENDING** (expected 2027 close). This is the key pending big Mag 7 deal as of June–July 2026, and Amazon's second-largest acquisition ever.

## Answer to "any pending big deals as of June–July 2026?"
**Yes — Amazon's ~$11.6B Globalstar deal** remains the one confirmed Mag 7 acquisition ≥$10B still pending.

## Notable rumors (all sub-$10B or denied)
- **Nvidia**: April 2026 rumor of buying a "large PC company" (Dell/HP jumped) — **Nvidia flatly denied it as "false."**
- **Meta**: ~$2B Manus AI deal vetoed by Beijing and unwound; explored Kalshi (failed) and India's CRED (~$4B, exploratory).
- **Microsoft**: Scouting AI startups (Inception talks) after ending OpenAI exclusivity — none at $10B+.
- **Apple**: Largest move was Q.ai (~$2B); avoids mega-deals.
- **Tesla**: ~$2B unnamed AI hardware acquisition; separately, reverse speculation that SpaceX might acquire *Tesla*.

## Context
2026 is a record M&A year (~$4T on track per PwC), but the biggest megadeals (Netflix–WBD ~$83B, EA ~$55B, Charter–Cox ~$34.5B) are **outside** the Mag 7, whose strategy skews toward AI talent tuck-ins and organic capex over $10B+ M&A.

Full findings, data points, and sources have been submitted via the structured output.

sources.title: Google wraps up $32B acquisition of cloud cybersecurity startup Wiz
sources.snippet: Google officially acquired Israeli cybersecurity firm Wiz for $32 billion in cash, a year after announcing the deal; largest in Google's history.

sources.title: Google Completes Acquisition of Wiz - Mar 11, 2026
sources.snippet: Google announced the completion of its acquisition of Wiz; Wiz joins Google Cloud.

sources.title: Amazon to buy Globalstar to bolster Leo satellite business in deal worth about $11.6 billion
sources.snippet: Amazon said it would acquire Globalstar for $90 a share, in a deal worth about $11.57 billion, to boost its Leo satellite business.

sources.title: Amazon Buys Satellite Firm For $11.6 Billion To Catch Up With SpaceX's Starlink
sources.snippet: Globalstar stockholders receive $90/share; deal expected to close in 2027 enabling Amazon Leo direct-to-device service.

sources.title: Breaking Down Amazon's Globalstar Acquisition
sources.snippet: Amazon's second-largest acquisition ever at ~$11.6B, surpassed only by the $13.7B Whole Foods purchase in 2017.

sources.title: Nvidia Is Negotiating To Buy A Large PC Oriented Company
sources.snippet: SemiAccurate report claiming Nvidia negotiating over a year to acquire a large PC-oriented company.

sources.title: Nvidia PC Acquisition Rumor: Dell Stock Surges 6.7% [2026]
sources.snippet: Dell surged 6.7% and HP hit highs on April 13, 2026 rumor before Nvidia issued a flat denial calling the report 'false.'

sources.title: NVIDIA denies rumor of talks to acquire unnamed PC maker
sources.snippet: NVIDIA denies SemiAccurate claim of PC maker acquisition talks.

sources.title: Apple Made Its Second-Biggest Acquisition Ever This Year
sources.snippet: Apple acquired Israeli startup Q.ai for close to $2 billion, its second-biggest acquisition ever after Beats ($3B, 2014).

sources.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing's demand
sources.snippet: Meta began dismantling its $2 billion acquisition of Manus after China vetoed the deal on national security grounds.

sources.title: Meta Explores Prediction Markets with New App Amid Acquisition Talks
sources.snippet: Meta's Zuckerberg announced 'Arena' prediction market after unsuccessful acquisition discussions with Kalshi (July 1, 2026).

sources.title: Microsoft Eyes AI Startup Deals Beyond OpenAI, Considers Inception Takeover
sources.snippet: Microsoft weighing AI startup deals; Inception in unresolved talks as of May 13, 2026.

sources.title: OpenAI And Microsoft End Exclusive Partnership And Revenue Sharing
sources.snippet: Microsoft and OpenAI ended exclusive partnership April 27, 2026; OpenAI can license models to third parties/rival clouds.

sources.title: Tesla quietly discloses $2 billion AI hardware company acquisition buried in filing
sources.snippet: Tesla agreed to acquire an unnamed AI hardware company for up to $2 billion in stock, disclosed in Q1 2026 10-Q.

sources.title: Will Tesla Be Acquired by SpaceX?
sources.snippet: Speculation SpaceX could acquire Tesla; Kalshi places odds at ~54% before May 1, 2027.

sources.title: Global M&A deal value on track to reach $4 trillion this year: PwC
sources.snippet: PwC: 2026 global M&A on track for $4 trillion, strongest since 2021, fueled by AI-driven megadeals; deals >$5B nearly half of value.

sources.title: Mega-deals propel global M&A to record first half
sources.snippet: LSEG: announced M&A reached $2.8 trillion in H1 2026, +48% YoY, highest year-to-date on record.

sources.title: Upcoming M&A Deals: Mergers and Acquisitions Tracker
sources.snippet: Tracker of 15 upcoming 2026-2027 deals; largest megadeals (Netflix-WBD $83B, PIF/Silver Lake-EA $55B, Charter-Cox $34.5B) are outside the Mag 7.

key_facts: Google/Alphabet CLOSED its $32 billion all-cash acquisition of cloud-security firm Wiz on March 11, 2026 — its largest acquisition ever (announced March 2025, ~12-month regulatory review).

Amazon announced a ~$11.6 billion ($11.57B; $90/share, cash-and-stock, ~23% premium) acquisition of satellite operator Globalstar on April 14, 2026; the deal is STILL PENDING and expected to close in 2027 — Amazon's second-largest acquisition ever.
Amazon–Globalstar is the primary confirmed Magnificent 7 acquisition of $10B+ that is pending as of June–July 2026.

Nvidia was rumored (SemiAccurate, April 13, 2026) to be negotiating to buy 'a large PC-oriented company' (Dell/HP shares jumped), but Nvidia FLATLY DENIED the report as 'false'; no deal materialized as of July 2026.
Apple has made no $10B+ deal in 2026; its largest move was ~$2B for Israeli AI startup Q.ai (confirmed Jan 29, 2026), its second-biggest acquisition ever after Beats ($3B, 2014).

Meta made no confirmed $10B+ acquisition; its ~$2B Manus AI deal was vetoed by Beijing (April 2026) and was being unwound in June 2026. Meta explored Kalshi (talks failed) and a ~$4B stake in India's CRED (exploratory).
Microsoft made no $10B+ acquisition; after ending OpenAI exclusivity (April 27, 2026) it is reportedly scouting AI startups (Inception talks mid-May 2026; considered and rejected Cursor).

Tesla disclosed a small acquisition (up to $2B for an unnamed AI hardware company) in its Q1 2026 10-Q; separately there is market speculation that SpaceX could acquire Tesla (Kalshi odds ~54% before May 1, 2027).
2026 is a record M&A year: PwC projects ~$4 trillion global deal value; LSEG reports $2.8 trillion in H1 2026 (+48% YoY), driven largely by AI infrastructure demand.
The largest pending megadeals of 2026 are outside the Mag 7 (e.g., Netflix–Warner Bros. Discovery ~$83B, PIF/Silver Lake–EA ~$55B, Charter–Cox ~$34.5B).

data_points.metric: Tesla unnamed AI hardware company acquisition (disclosed in 10-Q)
Global M&A deal value on track for 2026 (PwC)
